title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss recent AI industry news including Anthropic's Mythos, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in AI access, cost pressures on frontier labs, billing transparency issues, and Apple's price increases. The episode covers business model implications and market dynamics around frontier AI model availability and pricing.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy run through a slate of recent AI industry developments: Anthropic's Mythos, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government involvement in AI access, and Apple's price increases. The discussion centers on business model implications, focusing on cost pressures facing frontier labs and on billing transparency issues around model usage. The throughline is market dynamics governing frontier model availability and pricing, with attention to how labs manage inference costs and how those costs surface in pricing.
